description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a prominent carry handle integrated with iron sights. The rifle has a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard, and a textured pistol grip for secure handling. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and heat dissipation, and the barrel is of standard length, ending with a flash hider. The upper receiver includes a built-in carrying handle, which also serves as the rear sight, while the front sight is a fixed post. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters use.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, front sight post, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and stock clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the carry handle and iron sights.
